# kCFFTPStatusCodeKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFFTPStatusCodeKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfftpstatuscodekey)

-  kCFFTPStatusCodeKey 

Global Variable# kCFFTPStatusCodeKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFFTPStatusCodeKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfftpstatuscodekey#Discussion)

If an error of type `kCFFTPErrorUnexpectedStatusCode` is returned, querying this key returns the last status code sent by the FTP server in response to the previous operation.
